sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35603" key="e)nqorga/zei" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνθοργάζει·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πονεῖ,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνθορίσκει·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐνθρύπτει,</foreign> Id.</entryFree>
